== Notes for [[Item:Q111596|Q111596]] ==

https://www.google.es/books/edition/Descripci%C3%B3n_genealogica_y_historial_de/CAuIbrv8lmAC?hl=es&gbpv=1&dq=Adosinda+Romanez+de+Monterroso&pg=PA22&printsec=frontcover


This is the profilaxia of D.Sarracina, Countess of Lugo byarriage tô D.Ero Fernández Count of Lugo.From this consortium até leste tô daughters wwre born:
1-Santa Godina
2-D.Ermesenda Eris de Lugo
( Although it is know-how that D.Ero Fernandez, was Madrid at leste twice)

>Publication: Madrid: Imprenta de F. Sanchez a cargo de A. Espinosa, 1859-1866.

>Page: 2: 243

''in: The Wensell's from Norway to South America <http://worldconnect.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=wensell&id=I18204>'' /!\

1 NAME Adosisada //
2 GIVN Adosisada
2 SURN

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
